details: Quote matches paper verbatim; compound 2d, mp 160-162 °C confirmed in 027_PMC9188358.
Quote matches paper (allowing whitespace diffs: '1H'/'1 H', '(46)'/'( 46 )', 'Rf'/'R f'); compound 46, m.p. 130-132 °C confirmed in 020_PMC11206691.
Quote matches paper for compound 27 N-(Adamantan-1-yl)cinnamamide; Mp 220-221 °C confirmed in 010_PMC12940417.
Quote matches paper for compound 7a; M.p. 128-130 oC confirmed in 053_PMC6147013.
Quote matches paper for compound 3a (pdftotext renders '6'' as '60'); Mp 247-250 °C confirmed in fernandes_2018_pyridazine_suzuki.pdf.
Quote matches paper for compound 15; Mp 179-182 °C confirmed in 010_PMC12940417.
Table 1 quote matches paper; compound I (C17H18N2O2) at 58-60 °C confirmed in 073_PMC13085778.
Quote matches paper for compound 16 (1,3-Diacetyl-5-(3-benzocoumarinoyl)benzene); mp >300°C confirmed in 098_PMC6146883.

Evidence_quote is paper masthead/title text ('Organo-niobate Ionic Liquids: Synthesis...Soare') and contains no Table 1 row, no '40 mol%', no '36' value — does not support the claim. Actual value lives in Table 1 row '40 36 9.4...'.
compound_name field is truncated to 'Phenyl(6′-'; full name in paper is 'Phenyl(6′-(phenylsulfinyl)-[1,1′:3′,1″-terphenyl]-4′-yl)methanone (10j)'. Quote and value 140 °C are otherwise correct.
Quote matches paper Spectral Data section for Mesuarianone (1); m.p. 166-167 °C confirmed in 155_PMC6259158.

compound_name field contains an entire experimental procedure paragraph instead of the compound name. The actual compound is '1-(1-Pentafluorophenyl-1H-pyrrole-2-yl)-ethanone (2b)'; mp 45-48 oC is correct in paper, but compound_name is garbage.
Quote matches paper for compound 5d; Mp 186 °C confirmed in 013_PMC12943095.
Quote matches paper glutaraldehyde discussion; mp -14 °C confirmed in 164_PMC7158184. DOI 10.1016/B978-0-12-803409-5.00008-2 also present in paper.

Tm 354.11 K → 80.96 °C conversion is correct (354.11 - 273.15 = 80.96). Quote has minor 'T m ¼ 354.1 1 K' spacing artifact from PDF; the underlying paper says '354.11 K' clearly in adrjanowicz_2017_amorphous_fenofibrate.pdf.
Quote 'm.p.>300°C' matches paper for compound 6b in 040_PMC6146956.
Quote matches paper for compound 1e; m.p. 121-124 °C confirmed in 070_PMC12985466.
Quote matches paper for compound 9c; mp 234-236 °C confirmed in 005_PMC12987641.
Quote matches paper for compound 10a (R)-Phenyl(6′-(p-tolylsulfinyl)-...; mp 186 °C confirmed in 021_PMC10673159.
Quote matches paper for compound 7b; M.p. 173-175 oC confirmed in 053_PMC6147013.

Evidence_quote is the article masthead/header text ('Molecules Molecules molecules Molecules : A Journal...Angeles E. 1 Santillán H. 1') and contains no mp value, no 114-116 °C, no compound name. Does not support the claim. The actual mp 114-116 °C exists elsewhere in 106_PMC6236365 but that text is not what the row quotes.
Quote matches paper for compound 4c; m.p. 165-166 °C confirmed in 045_PMC6264237.
compound_name field truncated to '...1H-Pyrazole-1-Carbo'; full name in paper is '...1H-Pyrazole-1-Carboxamide (5l)'. Quote and value 228-229 °C are otherwise correct.
Quote 'Yield, 69%, dark brown solid, mp 189-191 C' matches paper for compound V12 in 033_PMC7148931.
Quote matches paper for compound 24 N-(3-Bromobenzyl)-6-chloro-4-hydroxy-2-quinolone-3-carboxamide; m.p. 292-294 °C confirmed in 072_PMC12943595.
